steps.title: Translate the percentage relationship
steps.content:
The statement 24 is 10% of what number means 24 equals 10% of an unknown value. We can write this as:
$$24 = 0.10 \times x$$
Since $0.10 = \frac{1}{10}$, we can rewrite this as:
$$24 = \frac{1}{10} \times x$$

steps.title: Solve for the unknown number
steps.content:
To isolate $x$, multiply both sides by 10:
$$x = 24 \times 10 = 240$$
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
